heroSubtitleComplete: Results are shown below. Reset to run another search.
heroSubtitleInitial: 1:N face search without liveness—for active-user and session-style flows (single probe image).
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this demo.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send one raw base64 probe in image, required os (ANDROID, IOS, or DESKTOP), plus min_score and search_mode. This demo uses DESKTOP.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Similar to live search, but no liveness gate—use when the user is already in an authenticated or trusted session.
bulletApiClient: This demo uses searchActiveUser from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletLiveInstead: For liveness + 1:N, use search-live-face instead (see Face Search 1:N Live in the docs).
